HOMECONTACTABOUTPORTFOLIO LET'S TALK

BUILDING EXCELLENCE

Frequently asked questions

What does WB Built do?

WB Built is a Melbourne-based construction company delivering high-end residential, multi-residential and commercial projects. Our work includes bespoke homes, apartment developments, commercial buildings, fitouts, refurbishments and design and construct delivery.

What types of projects do you specialise in?

We specialise in high-end residential construction, multi-residential developments, commercial and office buildings, hospitality and bespoke fitouts, and design and construct projects. Our team is experienced in technically detailed, architecturally driven projects where quality, coordination and delivery matter.

Do you only work on large projects?

No. While WB Built has experience delivering complex multi-residential and commercial work, we also take on high-end residential and boutique construction projects where detail, finish and disciplined delivery are critical.

Do you work with architects, designers and consultants?

Yes. We work closely with architects, designers, engineers, consultants and clients throughout the construction process. Collaboration and clear communication are a core part of how we deliver successful outcomes.

Do you offer design and construct services?

Yes. WB Built supports design and construct delivery, working with consultants early to improve buildability, manage complexity, reduce risk and keep projects aligned to budget and program.

What areas do you work in?

WB Built is based in Melbourne and works across metropolitan Melbourne and surrounding areas, depending on the project. For the right opportunity, we’re happy to discuss location as part of the initial conversation.

What sectors do you work across?

Our experience spans residential, multi-residential, commercial, hospitality, education, industrial and community infrastructure. This breadth allows us to bring strong systems, practical knowledge and technical capability to a wide range of project types.

What makes WB Built different?

We focus on precision, integrity, quality workmanship and strong site management. Clients value our hands-on approach, clear communication, technical problem solving and the way we manage projects with structure and accountability from start to finish.

How early should I contact you?

The earlier, the better. Bringing us into the conversation early can help with planning, buildability, budgeting, staging and identifying risks before construction begins.

Can I contact you before plans are finalised?

Yes. You do not need to wait until everything is fully resolved. We’re happy to have an initial conversation, review early information and help point the project in the right direction.

Can I upload plans or project documents through the website?

Yes. The website can be used to submit enquiries and upload plans, drawings, specifications, photos or other project documents for review before we get in touch.

What should I send when making an enquiry?

Anything that helps us understand the project is useful, including concept plans, architectural drawings, site information, project photos, timing expectations or a short project summary. If you do not have all of that yet, a simple enquiry is still enough to start.

Do you provide estimates or tender submissions?

Yes. Depending on the stage of the project, we can review documentation, discuss feasibility and provide pricing, estimates or tender submissions where appropriate.

Do you manage complex construction projects?

Yes. WB Built has experience across complex structural builds, basements, façade treatments, services coordination, live environments and multi-stage programs.

Are safety and quality important to your process?

Yes. Safety, accountability and quality are central to how we operate. We maintain strong site standards, clear systems and a culture of responsibility across all projects.

Do you work on live or occupied environments?

Yes. We understand the additional care, planning and coordination required for projects in live environments, including commercial, hospitality, education and refurbishment settings.

Who will I be dealing with?

You will be dealing with an experienced team across leadership, project management, site management and coordination. The WB Built team structure includes Matthew Whelan, David Hanvey, Daniel Lane and Maxx Hart, supported by operations and site staff.

Is WB Built licensed?

Yes. WB Built holds both Commercial Unlimited and Domestic Unlimited builder registrations in Victoria.

How do I get in touch?

You can contact WB Built through the website contact form, by email at info@wbbuilt.com.au, or by phone on 0423 943 823 to discuss your project or send through documents for review.

Do you offer an obligation-free initial conversation?

Yes. WB Built offers a no-obligation initial conversation to understand the project and see whether there is a good fit.
